name: ASUS TUF GAMING B650EM-E WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1 x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.2
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B650EM-E WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Micro-ATX AM5 gaming motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 6, and dual DisplayPort for balanced performance builds.
